description_long: This is a three-tiered chocolate cake lavishly decorated with an assortment of fresh fruits, including strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, and cherries. Each tier is coated with a glossy chocolate ganache that drips artfully down the sides, creating a visually appealing 'drip' effect. The cake layers alternate between chocolate and a lighter cream or sponge, visible through the semi-naked style of the outer frosting. The top and edges of each tier are generously adorned with whole and halved strawberries, clusters of blueberries, raspberries, cherries, and sprigs of green leaves for added color and freshness. The cake sits on a round, flat brown cake board that provides stability and a clean presentation. The overall appearance is festive, rustic, and inviting, making it suitable for celebrations in urban parks, cafes, or outdoor gatherings.
description: A three-tiered chocolate drip cake decorated with fresh strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, cherries, and green leaves, presented on a round brown cake board. The cake features alternating chocolate and cream layers with a glossy ganache finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full three tiers, with prominent strawberries and blueberries on each level and a clear view of the chocolate ganache drips.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the abundance of raspberries and cherries on the middle and top tiers, with the chocolate drip effect visible on all sides.
description_view_2: A slightly rotated view emphasizing the layered structure and the even distribution of fruit decorations, especially the strawberries and blueberries.
description_view_3: Back view with a focus on the arrangement of raspberries and the leafy green accents, as well as the consistent chocolate drip pattern.
